source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt: Design the 1U CubeSat primary structural bus for an African-regional student CubeSat benchmark, launching via a standard P-POD-compliant dispenser, as a multi-part bolted assembly. The assembly consists of four corner deployer rails, four body side panels (±X, ±Y), a top payload aperture panel, a bottom deployer-interface panel, a central payload tray with four M3 mounting bosses on an 80 x 80 mm bolt pattern, and the fastener / hardware set. Envelope must comply with CDS Rev 14.1: 100.0 mm +/- 0.1 mm x 100.0 mm +/- 0.1 mm x 113.5 mm +/- 0.1 mm maximum, with four deployer rails of 8.5 mm minimum width at each corner, a minimum 75% anodized rail surface, and center of mass within +/- 2 cm of geometric center on each axis. Total wet mass must not exceed 2.0 kg. Material: Aluminum 6061-T6 (Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, density 2700 kg/m^3). Payload slot must expose a top aperture of at least 60 x 60 mm for a camera sensor and supply four M3 mounting bosses on an 80 x 80 mm bolt pattern. Load cases: (LC1) quasi-static launch: 14 g applied simultaneously on each of the three body axes on the wet 2.0 kg mass; (LC2) random vibration per CDS 14.1 Grms qualification profile (20-2000 Hz ASD table), response captured over 2 minutes per axis; (LC3) sine sweep: 10-100 Hz at 2 g base sweep, one octave per minute; (LC4) thermal cycling: -40 C to +85 C, 10 cycles, as a uniform swing with a 15 C internal electronics delta. Pass/fail per NASA-STD-5001B protoflight: max von Mises <= 276 / 1.25 = 220 MPa on yield and 310 / 1.4 = 221 MPa on ultimate under LC1; first natural frequency >= 100 Hz; random-vib 3-sigma response stress <= 220 MPa; thermal-deformation-induced CM shift <= 2 mm on any axis. Verification is performed on the assembled bolted model with representative M3 fastener stiffness at every panel/rail interface; per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail. Deliverables: STEP with all bodies, modal (first 10 modes), FEA per case on assembly, random-vib PSD response report, thermal displacement contour, and mass/CM report.
short_prompt:
Design the 1U CubeSat primary structural bus for an African-regional student CubeSat benchmark, launching via a P-POD-compliant dispenser, as a multi-part bolted assembly.

Envelope per CDS Rev 14.1: 100.0 +/- 0.1 mm x 100.0 +/- 0.1 mm x 113.5 +/- 0.1 mm maximum, four deployer rails of 8.5 mm minimum width at each corner, >= 75% anodized, CM within +/- 2 cm. Wet mass <= 2.0 kg. Material Aluminum 6061-T6 (E 68.9 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, density 2700 kg/m^3). Qualification per NASA-STD-5001B protoflight (yield FoS 1.25, ultimate FoS 1.4).

Load cases.
- LC1 quasi-static launch: 14 g simultaneous on each of three body axes on wet 2.0 kg.
- LC2 random vibration per CDS 14.1 Grms, 20-2000 Hz, 2 minutes per axis.
- LC3 sine sweep: 10-100 Hz at 2 g base sweep, one octave per minute.
- LC4 thermal cycling: -40 C to +85 C, 10 cycles, with 15 C internal electronics delta.

First mode >= 100 Hz; thermal-induced CM shift <= 2 mm on any axis.

prompt.title: African-regional 1U CubeSat primary structure (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: 1U CubeSat bus as bolted assembly of 4 corner rails + 4 side panels + top + bottom + payload tray + fasteners, compliant with CDS 14.1 and NASA-STD-5001B.

parts.name: corner_rail
parts.role: one of four deployer rails at bus corners

parts.name: side_panel
parts.role: one of four body panels forming the ±X and ±Y faces

parts.name: top_aperture_panel
parts.role: top face with >= 60x60 mm camera aperture and four M3 bosses on 80x80 mm pattern

parts.name: bottom_deployer_panel
parts.role: bottom face interfacing with the P-POD pusher

parts.name: payload_tray
parts.role: internal tray supporting the camera payload via the 80x80 mm M3 bolt pattern

parts.name: fastener_set
parts.role: M3 stainless bolts tying rails, panels, and tray into a rigid bus

assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: +Z along long axis = deployer rail axis; origin at geometric center

boundary_conditions.interfaces: panels bolted to rails along full length at M3 pitch; payload tray bolted to side panels; representative M3 fastener stiffness at each joint
boundary_conditions.support: deployer rails constrained in P-POD idealization

prompt.objective: minimize wet mass while passing protoflight, random-vib, and thermal gates

interfaces.load_path: side panel shear into rail along full length
top aperture panel into rail ends
bottom deployer panel into rail ends
payload tray bolted to side panels through 80x80 pattern
fastener clamp force establishing bus rigidity

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: CDS 14.1 1U CubeSat buses are bolted boxes of corner rails, side panels, top + bottom end plates, and internal payload trays; protoflight and random-vib qualification are always run on the assembled bolted bus.
notes.speculation_caveats: Payload-tray count and fastener pitch are speculative; materials, loads, and thresholds inherit the original sample verbatim.
